🖤Medium LADY D-JOY Handbag in 'White Lambskin'
This Lady D-Joy handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black matte calfskin, it features a striking quilting detail created with classic diagonal quilting stitching, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship. Matching metal D.I.O.R. charms add an elegant touch. The small size comes with a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Model: 9250
Size: 26×13.5×5 cm
Fits one iPhone and other accessories

❤️❤️Mini size
This Dior Groove 20 bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from pink calfskin, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm is adorned with the Christian Dior Paris logo and gold-finished stars, making it unique. The bag opens with a zip lock and key charm. The spacious compartment features an open pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Model: 8808
Dimensions: 16.5 x 10x 8cm (L x H x W)
